skill1.note: 6 shots × 10 pellets/shot = 60 hits, per engine's +hitsPerShot counter convention

skill1.kitLine: Duplicates 8.81% of the ATK of the ally with the highest ATK
skill1.note: Proxy: %-of-CASTER's-ATK (engine line 947). Exact solo / when Guilty is top-ATK ally; cold when a buffed teammate outranks her (⚑4/caveat 1).

skill2.kitLine: Increases stack count of stackable buffs by 1
skill2.note: No schema support for cross-buff stack-count amplifier. Measured REAL solo (bumps S1 ramp to cap one trigger early); allies' stackable buffs also not amplified in teams. Flagged ⚑5.

burst.kitLine: Affects the 1 enemy unit(s) with the highest final DEF
Deals 284.32% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage
Activates when Mind If I Borrow This? is at max stacks
burst.note: Engine has no full-stack gate; modeled always-on. True for every burst after ~20-30s ramp; first burst's riders slightly over-credited (⚑2/caveat 3).
Recognized-INERT: engine uses boss DEF≈0/140 so reduction is negligible at scope-lock. Kept visible per stat-line fidelity (engine line 943).

burst.kitLine: Deals 277.71% of final ATK as additional damage
burst.note: Auto FB-exempt; gated on max-stacks condition (always-on approximation)

documentedConfounds.text: S1 'highest ATK ally' modeled as casterAtkPct (self-ATK proxy) — cold when a buffed teammate outranks Guilty
documentedConfounds.why: In teams where another ally has higher ATK, the 8.81% is computed off a smaller base. Solo it is exact.

documentedConfounds.text: S2 'Increases stack count of stackable buffs by 1' unmodeled — no schema support
documentedConfounds.why: Measured real solo: bumps S1 ramp to cap one trigger early (~0.6% hotter). Also amplifies allies' stackable buffs in teams. Omission under-credits damage.

documentedConfounds.text: Burst 'at max stacks' gate on DEF▼ + 277.71% riders modeled always-on
documentedConfounds.why: First burst (before S1 ramp completes ~20-30s) is over-credited the 277.71% additional damage. Small magnitude: one burst out of ~9 in 180s.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑1 CADENCE TUPLE: pullsPerSec est=1.5, reloadFrames est=181 (~3.0s), rolling-reload unknown — datamine-unreliable
documentedConfounds.why: Drives stack ramp timing; if cadence is wrong, steady-state stack level shifts. Solo-validated at 0.981 so current estimate is close.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑2 S1 STACK STEADY-STATE: engine-derived ≈5 held after ramp; first-burst additional-damage assumes full stacks
documentedConfounds.why: Same as caveat 3 — first burst over-credited if stacks aren't at 5 yet.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑3 SG PELLET LANDING + CORE-BAND MAGNITUDE: HR-contaminated bands → per-shot magnitude low-confidence
documentedConfounds.why: Affects all SG units equally; open backlog item. Note says old cap is DEAD and bands are HR-CLEAN per isabel read.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑4 'HIGHEST-ATK ally' basis: casterAtkPct proxies off Guilty's own ATK
documentedConfounds.why: Same as caveat 1 — exact solo, cold in teams with a higher-ATK ally.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑5 S2 'stack count of buffs +1': unexpressible in schema, shipped as 0-effect
documentedConfounds.why: Same as caveat 2 — under-credits ~0.6% solo + team amplification.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Guilty as a self-stacking B2 Attacker: S1 grants up to 5 stacks of 8.81% ATK (proxied off her own ATK via casterAtkPct since no 'highest ally' schema exists), S2 gives a Wind-team ATK buff, and burst fires two damage instances plus an inert DEF debuff. Key approximations: the 'highest ATK ally' source is a caster-ATK proxy (exact solo, cold in teams), the S2 stack-count amplifier is unexpressible and shipped as zero-effect (measured ~0.6% real), and the burst's max-stacks gate is always-on (over-credits the first burst by one 277.71% hit). Solo-validated at 0.981 ratio; no board data yet.
